Hermès Garden Party 30 - Black & White 'Panda' Canvas & Leather

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Garden Party 30 (GP30)
Material: Toile Canvas and Premium Leather
Color: Black and White (Highly sought-after 'Panda' colorway)
Blind Stamp: Square H
Dimensions: 30 cm (Lightweight and versatile size)
Special Feature: Includes the original Hermès shoulder strap (Rare)

Condition Report:
Condition: Excellent / Like New.
The bag has been meticulously maintained and is in outstanding condition. It holds its original structural shape perfectly with excellent rigidity. Both the exterior canvas/leather and the interior lining are exceptionally clean with no obvious signs of wear.

This lightweight 30cm version is highly versatile and perfect for everyday use. Please examine all photos carefully before placing your order to ensure you are fully satisfied with the condition.
